summary: Created skills/autopilot/SKILL.md (375 lines) — headless dispatcher with YAML frontmatter (name: autopilot, disable-model-invocation: true, argument-hint: [--dry-run]), Steps 0-7 covering preflight+MCP ping, dry-run short-circuit, mkdir-based portable-bash lock (with ownership-verifying trap installed AFTER successful mkdir), cross-host INFO line, bug+feature query reading with [WARN] on absent Feature Workflow, bug-priority-on-overlap two-query classification, sequential per-issue Skill-tool dispatch to fix-ticket/implement-feature, Stop-on-error branch handling, and final markdown summary table. All 7 config keys (Bug query, Feature query, Max issues per run, Max features per run, Stop on error, Dry run, Lock file) referenced by exact name. Copy-pasteable bash lock snippet included for operators. All verification greps pass: anchored frontmatter (1/1/1), >=3 log prefixes (30 matches), mkdir (13), trap (15), 7 config keys (43), AC-30 literal mkdir .ceos-agents/autopilot.lock reference present, AC-36 single-host-operation + disjoint-query phrases present.
